description: Updates a Checklist (Inspection) Schedule in a specified Project

first_inspection_due_at.description: Due at timestamp of first inspection

ends_at.description: Due at timestamp of last inspection

next_due_at.description: Due at timestamp of next inspection to be created

total_inspections_scheduled.description: Total amount of inpections that will be created

items.description: User IDs assigned to the schedule

responsible_contractor_id.description: ID of Vendor responsible for the work being inspected

name.description: The name for the Checklist Schedule.

first_inspection_due_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the first Inspection in the Schedule should be due. Cannot be in the past.

ends_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the last Inspection in the Schedule should be due. Not used when frequency is once.

frequency.description: The frequency at which Inspections will be created by the Schedule.

location_id.description: The ID of the Location to set on the Schedule.

point_of_contact_id.description: The ID of a User to be set as the of the point of contact on the Schedule

responsible_contractor_id.description: The ID of a vendor to set as the responsible contractor on the Schedule.

specification_section_id.description: The ID of the specification section to set on the Schedule.

items.description: The ID of a user to set as an assignee on the Schedule.
The ID of a user to set on the distribution list for the Schedule.

equipment_id.description: The ID of the Equipment to set on the Schedule.
